title: Provision a Gateway
description:
## Provision a Gateway

A `Gateway` represents the instantiation of network infrastructure (like a load balancer or proxy) defined by a `GatewayClass`. It defines the entry points (listeners) where the gateway will accept incoming traffic.

**Your task:**

Create a `Gateway` named `external-gateway` in the namespace `gateway-lab` that satisfies the following conditions:
- Uses the `shared-gateway-class` GatewayClass.
- Defines a single listener named `http-listener` on port `80` with the `HTTP` protocol.
- Restricts route attachment to routes from the same namespace (`spec.listeners[*].allowedRoutes.namespaces.from` set to `Same`).

```bash
# Verify your progress:
kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o yaml
```

hints.title: Gateway structure
hints.body: A Gateway uses spec.gatewayClassName to associate with a GatewayClass, and spec.listeners to define the ports and protocols. Use namespaces.from: Same under allowedRoutes.
hints.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: external-gateway
  namespace: gateway-lab
spec:
  gatewayClassName: shared-gateway-class
  listeners:
  - name: http-listener
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
    allowedRoutes:
      namespaces:
        from: Same
EOF

setup_commands.command:
kubectl apply -f - <<'EOF'
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: GatewayClass
metadata:
  name: shared-gateway-class
spec:
  controllerName: example.com/gateway-controller
EOF

validation.description: Check that the Gateway external-gateway is configured correctly in namespace gateway-lab

commands.command: kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.metadata.name}'
kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.gatewayClassName}'
kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.listeners[0].port}'
kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.listeners[0].protocol}'
kubectl get gateway external-gateway -n gateway-lab -o jsonpath='{.spec.listeners[0].name}'
